Build a grid grob for one page of a tfl_table

build_table_grob.Rd

Build a grid grob for one page of a tfl_table

Usage

build_table_grob(
  row_page,
  col_group_idx,
  n_group_cols,
  resolved_cols,
  tbl,
  row_heights_in = NULL,
  cont_row_h_in = NULL,
  is_first_col_page = TRUE,
  is_last_col_page = TRUE
)

Arguments

row_page

List from paginate_rows(): $rows, $is_cont_top, $is_cont_bottom, $group_starts.

col_group_idx

Integer vector of column indices (1-based into resolved_cols) for this column group, including row-header columns first.

n_group_cols

Number of row-header (group) columns.

resolved_cols

Full list of resolved column specs (all columns).

tbl

The tfl_table object.

Value

A gTree of class "tfl_table_grob".

On this page
